title: Marqeta (MQ) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Marqeta Q4 2024 Earnings Summary. Key Metrics: Q4 2024 Performance: Total Process Volume (TPV): $80 billion, up 29% YoY. Net Revenue: $136 million, up 14% YoY. Gross Profit: $98 million (72% margin), up 18% YoY. Adjusted EBITDA: $13 million (9% margin). Full-Year 2024: TPV Growth: 31%. Adjusted EBITDA: $29 million (6% margin). Leadership Transition: Simon Khalaf stepped down as CEO. Mike Milotich, the interim CEO and CFO, stated confidence in capturing opportunities while managing the transition. Strategic Wins: Secured consumer co-brand credit partnership with major airline. European business TPV grew over 100%. Signed first multinational solution sale with U.S.-based B2B payments company. Key Initiatives: Adding American Express as network option in 2025. Acquiring TransactPay to enhance European program management capabilities. Advancing flexible credentials and BNPL innovations. 2025 Guidance: Net Revenue Growth: 16-18%. Gross Profit Growth: 14-16%. Adjusted EBITDA Margin: 9-10%. TPV Growth: Mid-to-high 20s. New programs expected to contribute over $40 million in revenue. Analyst Concerns: Key risks include macroeconomic sensitivity and customer launch timing dependencies beyond Marqeta's control.
